expectations.evidence: Response explicitly recommends: "Replace h-screen with min-h-[100dvh] or Tailwind's min-h-dvh (if using Tailwind v3.4+)" with before/after code examples showing the change.

expectations.text: Response converts px values to rem-based Tailwind classes
expectations.evidence: Converts fixed px padding to responsive Tailwind classes: "px-4 py-8 sm:px-8 sm:py-12 md:px-12 md:py-16 lg:px-16 lg:py-20" replacing "px-[60px] py-[80px]".

expectations.text: Response adds mobile-first responsive typography classes
expectations.evidence: Uses mobile-first responsive typography: "text-3xl sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold text-center".

expectations.text: Response makes CTA button full-width on mobile (w-full sm:w-auto)
expectations.evidence: CTA button uses "w-full sm:w-auto" pattern: "<Button className='w-full sm:w-auto'>Get Started</Button>" within a "flex flex-col gap-3 w-full sm:flex-row sm:w-auto" container.
